_note: Common crop diseases/pests keyed for symptom matching. Disease names follow the PlantVillage taxonomy used in agricultural ML datasets. Remedies are general guidance — always follow local extension advice and product labels.

diseases.name: Early blight (Alternaria solani)
diseases.organic: Remove affected leaves; spray neem oil or a copper-based fungicide; mulch to prevent soil splash.
diseases.chemical: Mancozeb or chlorothalonil per label intervals.
diseases.prevention: Rotate crops, stake plants for airflow, water at the base not on leaves.

diseases.name: Late blight (Phytophthora infestans)
diseases.organic: Remove and destroy infected plants immediately; copper spray as protectant.
diseases.chemical: Cymoxanil + mancozeb; act fast — spreads in cool, wet weather.
diseases.prevention: Avoid overhead irrigation; ensure spacing; plant resistant varieties.

diseases.name: Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Virus (whitefly-borne)
diseases.organic: Control whiteflies with yellow sticky traps and neem; remove infected plants.
diseases.chemical: Insecticides targeting whitefly vector (e.g., imidacloprid) per label.
diseases.prevention: Use virus-free seedlings, insect-proof nets, reflective mulch.

diseases.name: Late blight (Phytophthora infestans)
diseases.organic: Remove infected foliage; copper-based protectant sprays.
diseases.chemical: Metalaxyl + mancozeb; preventive sprays in cool wet spells.
diseases.prevention: Plant certified seed, hill soil over tubers, ensure drainage.

diseases.name: Early blight (Alternaria solani)
diseases.organic: Neem or copper fungicide; remove debris.
diseases.prevention: Crop rotation, balanced nitrogen, good spacing.

diseases.name: Rice blast (Magnaporthe oryzae)
diseases.organic: Balanced nitrogen, silica amendments; avoid excess N.
diseases.chemical: Tricyclazole at early symptoms per label.
diseases.prevention: Resistant varieties, avoid dense planting, manage water.

diseases.name: Bacterial leaf blight (Xanthomonas oryzae)
diseases.organic: Drain field periodically; balanced fertilization; copper sprays.
diseases.prevention: Use resistant varieties, clean seed, avoid leaf injury.

diseases.name: Brown spot (Bipolaris oryzae)
diseases.prevention: Improve soil fertility, use healthy seed.

diseases.name: Common rust (Puccinia sorghi)
diseases.organic: Remove heavily infected leaves; ensure airflow.
diseases.chemical: Triazole fungicide if severe and early.

diseases.name: Northern leaf blight (Exserohilum turcicum)
diseases.chemical: Fungicide at early onset for susceptible hybrids.
diseases.prevention: Resistant hybrids, rotate with non-host crops.

diseases.name: Leaf rust (Puccinia triticina)
diseases.chemical: Propiconazole at first signs per label.
diseases.prevention: Resistant varieties, monitor during humid spring.

diseases.name: Bollworm (Helicoverpa) infestation
diseases.organic: Pheromone traps, Bt sprays, hand-pick larvae, encourage natural predators.
diseases.chemical: Use recommended insecticides in rotation to avoid resistance; follow label.
diseases.prevention: Bt cotton varieties, intercropping, regular scouting.

diseases.name: Aphid infestation
diseases.organic: Spray neem oil or insecticidal soap; release ladybirds; strong water jet.
diseases.chemical: Systemic insecticide only if severe, per label.
diseases.prevention: Avoid excess nitrogen, encourage beneficial insects.

diseases.name: Powdery mildew
diseases.organic: Spray potassium bicarbonate or diluted milk solution; improve airflow.
diseases.chemical: Sulfur or triazole fungicide per label.
diseases.prevention: Resistant varieties, proper spacing, avoid water stress.

diseases.name: Nutrient deficiency (general)
diseases.organic: Apply compost/FYM; get a soil test; correct specific nutrient.
diseases.chemical: Balanced NPK or targeted fertilizer based on soil test.
diseases.prevention: Regular soil testing, organic matter, crop rotation.
